k.name: Monomolecular Blade
k.effect: When using Slinding Uppercut, has a 100% chance to remove 1 buff(s) from the target
k.effect10: When using Slinding Uppercut, has a 100% chance to remove 2 buff(s) from the target

vera.name: Blade of Destiny
vera.effect: Increases Critical Damage by 3% after killing an enemy (max 5 stacks)
vera.effect10: Increases Critical Damage by 5% after killing an enemy (max 5 stacks)

snow.name: Glacial Bow
snow.effect: Frostblow has 40% chance to inflict Frozen on all targets
snow.effect10: Frostblow has 70% chance to inflict Frozen on all targets

iris.name: Reptilia Z-Power
iris.effect: Increases Attack and Defense for 1 turn(s) when attacking an enemy inflicted with Burned
iris.effect10: Element Burst has 80% chance to increase Attack and Defense for 1 turn(s) when attacking an enemy inflicted with Burned

lisha.name: Cleaning Brush
lisha.effect: When using Meowteor Shower, increases damage dealt inversely proportionnal to the number of targets
lisha.effect10: When using Meowteor Shower, increases Penetration by 30% when there is only one target

sofia.name: Tempest
sofia.effect: Increases the Dual Attack damage of all allies (excluding skill chains)
sofia.effect10: Increases Priority recovery efficiency of the wearer by 30%

alpha.name: Nostalgic Music Box
alpha.effect: At the start of the battle, increases Effectiveness for 1 turn(s)
alpha.effect10: When defeating an enemy, increases Effectiveness for 1 turn(s)

rhona.name: Sword of Sorrows
rhona.effect10: Damage dealt increases proportional to Critical Damage (Max 100%)

luna.name: Machiavelli
luna.effect: Water allies' Dual Attack Weakness Gauge damage +70%

hilde.name: Hound
hilde.effect: Increases Health of the wearer by 35%
hilde.effect10: Increases Damage dealt by For Pandemonium! by 50%

adelie.name: Titanic Anchor
adelie.effect: When using Aye Aye Captain!, increases damage dealt inversely proportional to the number of targets
adelie.effect10: When using Aye Aye Captain! increases Penetration by 30% when there is only one target.
